ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "season" INTEGER /* The season during which the statistics were recorded */,
  "team" TEXT /* The team for which the statistics were recorded */,
  "gb_fb" REAL /* Games behind or ahead in the standings */,
  "ld_percent" REAL /* Line drive percentage */,
  "gb_percent" REAL /* Ground ball percentage */,
  "fb_percent" REAL /* Fly ball percentage */,
  "iffb_percent" REAL /* Infield fly ball percentage */,
  "hr_fb" REAL /* Home run to fly ball ratio */,
  "ifh_percent" REAL /* Infield hit percentage */,
  "buh_percent" REAL /* Bunt hit percentage */,
  "pull_percent" REAL /* Pull percentage (percentage of balls hit to pull field) */,
  "cent_percent" REAL /* Center field percentage (percentage of balls hit to center field) */,
  "oppo_percent" REAL /* Opposite field percentage (percentage of balls hit to opposite field) */,
  "soft_percent" REAL /* Soft hit percentage */,
  "med_percent" REAL /* Medium contact percentage */,
  "hard_percent" REAL /* Hard hit percentage */,
  "swing_miss_percent" REAL /* Swing miss percentage */,
  "foul_ball_percent" REAL /* Foul ball percentage */,
  "ground_ball_distance" REAL /* Ground ball distance */,
  "fly_ball_distance" REAL /* Fly ball distance */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Game date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League to which the team belongs */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division to which the team belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular season, postseason) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the league */,
  "league_format" TEXT /* Format of the league (e.g., American League, National League) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the user belongs */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stats */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record used for the prediction */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (percentage) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date on which the prediction was made */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the model used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES performance_stats ("stat_id")
)
